steps.t: Use the summoning horn at the beginning of the tunnel to summon Ausma to your side.
You should talk to Ausma. <rgb=#FF0000>If Ausma is missing, and the Call Ausma skill is not available, try using the /pet release command.</r…
You should destroy supply carts throughout Fauthshúg with the bombs Ausma gave you. <rgb=#FF0000>If Ausma is missing, and the Call Ausma skill i…
You should talk to Ausma. <rgb=#FF0000>If Ausma is missing, and the Call Ausma skill is not available, try using the /pet release command.</r…
Ausma has said she has an idea, and that you should stand back. You should watch this play out.
